seoTitle: Hawkesdale vs Hawkhurst — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawkesdale and Hawkhurst. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawkesdale and Hawkhurst.
heading: Hawkesdale vs Hawkhurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawkesdale, Victoria and Hawkhurst, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawkesdale has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hawkhurst (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawkesdale or Hawkhurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawkesdale has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Hawkhurst scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawkesdale scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Hawkhurst scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawkesdale or Hawkhurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawkesdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
